dates.summary: Today’s strongest AI stories split between one meaningful open-model release, one important agent-tooling capability jump, and one credible frontier-model leak. Qwen3.5-Omni stood out as the clearest concrete launch with practical multimodal implications. Anthropic’s leaked Mythos model drew heavy attention because it hints at another near-term step-up in flagship model competition, though details remain limited. On the tooling side, Claude Code gaining computer-use capabilities signals continued movement from code assistants toward fuller software agents. Research discussion was led by Hyperagents and test-time adaptation work, but those looked more like emerging technical directions than the day’s defining stories.
